inputs.description: Dataset-level source inputs that feed into this dataset. When a source includes a 'field' property, it represents a dataset-wide operation (e.g., GROUP BY, FILTER) where that source column affects the entire target dataset.

fields.description: Column-level lineage. Maps target field names in this dataset to their source inputs.

LineageDatasetFieldEntry.description: Column-level lineage for a single target field.

inputs.description: Source entities and/or fields that feed into this target field.

LineageDatasetInput.description: A source entity that feeds data into a lineage target.

namespace.description: The namespace of the source entity.

name.description: The name of the source entity.

type.description: The type of the source entity. DATASET for dataset entities. JOB for job entities, used when a job is the origin of data (e.g., a generator job that creates data without reading from any input dataset).

field.description: The specific field/column of the source dataset. When present at entity-level inputs, represents a dataset-wide operation (e.g., GROUP BY column). When present at field-level inputs, represents the source column that feeds into the target column.

transformations.description: Transformations applied to the source data.

LineageDatasetTransformation.description: A transformation applied to source data in a lineage relationship.

type.description: The type of the transformation. Allowed values are: DIRECT, INDIRECT.

subtype.description: The subtype of the transformation, e.g., IDENTITY, AGGREGATION, FILTER, JOIN, GROUP_BY, WINDOW, SORT, CONDITIONAL.

description.description: A string representation of the transformation applied.

masking.description: Whether the transformation masks the data (e.g., hashing PII).
